memory.summary: I have a plan to finish work before reading, but a friend just invited me to lunch, creating a conflict between my schedule and social interaction.
I made good progress on the assignment, but my friends are now gathering to order food, creating an immediate social opportunity.
I made progress on the analysis section, but with less than an hour left until the deadline, I am behind schedule and need to finish immediately.
I made slight progress on the analysis section, but with less than an hour until the deadline, I am still behind schedule and need to finish immediately.
I missed the 18:00 deadline for the analysis section with only 78% progress, leaving the task incomplete despite my recent efforts.
I finished the analysis section but missed the assigned reading deadline, leaving that task completely unfinished.
I made further progress on the analysis section, but I am still behind schedule with only 30 minutes remaining before the deadline.
I made slight progress on the analysis section, but I missed the 18:00 deadline and am now at 93% with only 30 minutes left.
I spent 15 minutes on the analysis section but made no progress, leaving me at 93% completion with only 15 minutes until the deadline.
I made slight progress on the analysis section, reaching 95% completion just as my energy is critically low and stress remains high.
I finally made progress on the analysis section, reaching 96% completion after working for half an hour, though my energy is now completely depleted.
I finally pushed the assignment to 98% completion, but my energy is now at zero and stress remains critically high.
